name: rosie-mcp-plugin
description: Codex plugin for the Rosie remote MCP server and Alameda County resource navigation workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Rosie resource discovery and search guidance.
interface.longDescription: Installs the hosted Rosie MCP server and adds skills that help agents navigate Alameda County resource discovery, category exploration, and search telemetry.
defaultPrompt: Find housing and food support in Oakland using Rosie.
List Rosie service categories before searching broadly.
Check Rosie search telemetry for the last 30 days.
